title: Rakata (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rakata''' and '''Rakatan''' may refer to the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Rakatan]]''', a [[Sentience|sentient]] [[species]]
*'''[[Rakata Prime]]''', a [[planet]] in the [[Unknown Regions]]
*'''[[Rakatan wraith box]]''', a mystical antiquity
*'''[[Uprising against the Rakatan invaders]]''', an uprising of the [[Kuati]] people

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '[[Rakata/Legends|''Rakata''']], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]
*[[Rakata (language)|'''Rakata''']], their [[Language/Legends|language]], also known as '''Rakatan'''
**'''[[Rakatan writing system]]''', the [[Writing/Legends|written form]] of the Rakata language
*The '''[[Lehon system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] also known as the '''Rakata system'''
*'[[Lehon/Legends|''Lehon''']], the Rakatan [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] in the system of the same name, also known as '''Rakata''' or '''Rakata Prime'''
*'''[[Black Rakata]]''', a Rakatan tribe on Lehon
**'''[[Black Rakatan Settlement]]''', the enclave of this tribe
**'''[[Elder Rakatan Settlement]]''', the enclave of the Rakatan [[Elders (Rakatan)|Elders]]
*'''[[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]]''', an [[Galaxy/Legends|interstellar]] [[Politics/Legends|empire]] ruled by the Rakata, also known as the '''Rakatan Empire''', or the '''Rakata Empire'''
*'''[[Rakatan annihilator]]''', large walkers used by the Infinite Empire
*'''[[Rakatan Archipelago]]''', a Rakatan diasporic region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]
*'''[[Rakatan revolt]]''', an uprising of the Rakata against the [[Celestial/Legends|Celestials]]
*'''[[Rakatan Civil War]]''', a conflict that tore apart the Infinite Empire
*'''[[Rakatan plague]]''', a plague that drastically reduced the Rakata population
*'''[[Honoghr Rakatan temple]]''', a temple on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]]
*[[Rakatan ruins (Dantooine)|'''Rakatan ruins''']], on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]
*[[Rakatan Ruins (Tatooine)|'''Rakatan Ruins''']] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*'''[[Rakatan xenoforming station]]''', an ancient [[Space station/Legends|station]] that could [[Terraforming/Legends|terraform]] entire planets
*'''[[Ancient Rakatan Keep]]''', the largest region of [[The Tomb]] on the planet [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]
*'''[[Excavated Rakata vault]]''', a vault in the [[Alien Gangland]] on Belsavis
*'''''[[Star Maps and Scripts: The Rakata Connection]]''''', a thesis about the Rakatan influence on the contemporary writing systems
*'''''[[The Rakata and the Unknown World]]''''', a [[Book/Legends|book]] written by [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]]

{{Disambig}}
